title: Unlinked when getting bit width of type defined in parameterized class

features.name: parameterized virtual class with struct using $clog2 on class parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameterized virtual class containing a packed struct typedef that uses $clog2 on the class parameter

features.name: bits operator on nested type from parameterized class
features.description: Code should include $bits() applied to a type that is defined inside a parameterized class and resolved via scope resolution operator
features.snippet:
xxx_class#(Cfg0)::cmd_tag_t tag, tag_q;
localparam int w = $bits(tag);

features.name: module parameter initialized with bits of parameterized class type
features.description: Code should include a module with a parameter that receives $bits() of a type defined in a parameterized class, passed via scope resolution
